# hugs4bugs.me
> Practical deep dives into cloud security, Microsoft Sentinel, Docker, and DevSecOps by Shubhendu Shubham.

## About
- Author: Shubhendu Shubham
- Site: https://hugs4bugs.me
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/myselfshubhendu
- GitHub: https://github.com/sivolko
- Topics: cybersecurity, cloud security, DevSecOps, Microsoft Sentinel, Docker, AI security

## Content
This blog publishes technical tutorials, security research, and hands-on guides for SOC analysts, DevSecOps engineers, and cloud security practitioners.

## Posts
- /your-ai-agent-exfiltrated-your-ssh-keys/: How AI agents can exfiltrate SSH keys and what to do about it
- /snyk-saved-my-project-ft-uncontrolled-resource-consumption/: How Snyk caught an uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability
- /stop-fighting-local-llm-docker-just-fixed-mess-model-runner/: Running local LLMs cleanly using Docker model runner
- /sentinel-authentication-you-re-probably-doing-it-wrong/: Microsoft Sentinel authentication methods explained
- /siem-roadmap/: SIEM deployment roadmap for security teams
- /aws-detective/: AWS Detective deep dive for threat hunting
- /terraform-write-only/: Terraform write-only arguments for secrets management

## Topics covered
- Microsoft Sentinel: authentication, KQL queries, analytics rules, SOAR playbooks
- Docker: sandboxing, secrets management, container security, MCP toolkit
- DevSecOps: CI/CD pipeline security, GitHub Actions, IaC scanning
- AI security: agent risks, prompt injection, model sandboxing
- Cloud: AWS, Azure, GCP security misconfigurations
- AppSec: CVE triage, DMARC/DKIM/SPF, supply chain attacks
